user.title: Set up Free Games
user.description: Add the LootScraper free games feed to Home Assistant. Select which stores to track - a sensor will be created for each selected platform.

data_description.platforms: Choose one or more platforms. You can change this later from the Configure button.
data_description.base_url: URL of the LootScraper feed server. Defaults to the public feed — change this only if you run your own self-hosted instance.
data_description.scan_interval_minutes: How often to check for new offers, in minutes (30–1440). Steam updates roughly every 30 minutes; other stores change less often.

abort.already_configured: Free Games is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the feed at this URL. Check that it's reachable and try again.

init.title: Free Games Options
init.description: Select which platform sensors to enable. Each enabled platform creates a sensor showing the current free game count.

data_description.base_url: URL of the LootScraper feed server. Change this only if you run your own self-hosted instance.
data_description.scan_interval_minutes: How often to check for new offers, in minutes (30–1440).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the feed at this URL. Check that it's reachable and try again.

persistent_fetch_failure_default_url.title: Free Games feed is unreachable
persistent_fetch_failure_default_url.description: The Free Games integration has failed to fetch offers for several consecutive attempts. This may be a temporary outage of the public LootScraper feed service, or a network connectivity issue on this Home Assistant instance. No action is needed if this resolves on its own; if it persists, check your internet connection.

persistent_fetch_failure_custom_url.title: Self-hosted Free Games feed is unreachable
persistent_fetch_failure_custom_url.description: The Free Games integration has failed to fetch offers from your configured base URL for several consecutive attempts. Check that your self-hosted LootScraper instance is running and reachable, and that the base URL in the integration's options is still correct.

amazon_loot.name: Amazon In-Game Loot Active Free Games

steam_loot.name: Steam In-Game Loot Active Free Games
